action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from empty workspace. Need to establish baseline quickly. Analysis: First iteration should train minimal epochs, submit eval to measure time and get baseline accuracy. Decision: Write basic model (ResNet50), training loop with 5 epochs, predict script, then submit eval.
